metadata.title: SKU Sequence Generator for Excel - SKU-0001 Labels
metadata.description: Generate SKU numbers such as SKU-0001, SKU-0002, and SKU-0003 for Excel, inventory lists, CSV imports, and ecommerce catalogs.

hero.title: SKU sequence generator for Excel
hero.description: Create SKU labels with prefixes, separators, padding, and row counts without dragging a spreadsheet fill handle.

announcement.title: For SKU-0001 lists, catalog imports, and product cleanup

intent.title: Make SKU numbers that stay consistent across exports
intent.description: SKU lists usually need a predictable pattern. Set the prefix, start number, separator, and padding once, then copy the formula, text, or CSV preview.

items.title: Zero-padded SKUs
items.description: Generate SKU-0001, SKU-0002, SKU-0003, or any fixed-width numbering pattern.

items.title: Catalog import prep
items.description: Use TXT or CSV output when another inventory system needs fixed SKU values.

items.title: Formula output for large sheets
items.description: Use the Excel formula when the SKU range is too large for manual typing or dragging.

workflow.title: How to create SKU-0001 style labels
workflow.description: Start with the SKU pattern, then choose the output that fits your spreadsheet workflow.

items.title: Enter SKU as the prefix
items.description: Use a hyphen separator when you want labels like SKU-0001.

items.title: Set padding to 4
items.description: Padding keeps SKU values aligned as numbers grow from 9 to 10, 99 to 100, and beyond.

items.title: Copy formula or fixed values
items.description: Use formulas for live Excel ranges or TXT and CSV when importing values elsewhere.

related.title: Related spreadsheet generators
related.description: Use the page that matches the label pattern you need.

items.title: Account labels
items.description: For Account1, Client1, and user ID sequences.

items.title: Autofill without dragging
items.description: For users who want to avoid long fill-handle operations.

items.question: Can I generate SKU-0001 through SKU-5000?
items.answer: Yes. Use SKU as the prefix, a hyphen separator, start at 1, set rows to 5000, and set zero padding to 4.

items.question: Can I download the SKU list?
items.answer: Yes. The generator can download TXT output and CSV previews for fixed-value workflows.

items.question: Does this validate real product SKUs?
items.answer: No. It creates a numbering sequence. You should still check that the generated SKUs match your inventory rules.

cta.title: Generate SKU labels now
cta.description: Open the generator, enter your SKU pattern, and copy the formula, TXT, or CSV output.
